 When working on Stata code or Stata C/C++ plugin tasks:
 
 - Use `/opt/copilot-resources/stata-skill` as the primary reference.
 - Prefer documentation under:
   - `/opt/copilot-resources/stata-skill/skills`
   - `/opt/copilot-resources/stata-skill/plugins`
 - Follow syntax conventions and package patterns from this repository.
